a large number of ca~es by me and has been found to be never failing.
Men can manage to live one hundred years-the J1atural term given
to them_:_if they are not carried away by Augantaka Mrutyua or mis
fortunes and accidents. Kata Mrutyu (Proper Death) comes t;o man
after his hundredth year. But very few live up to that old ate and
preserve their bodily energy. Four kinds of remedies are suggested
(!) Medicines, (2) Japa$ (3) Hom~ and (4) Danas.
The last three involve a large number of scientific points to ex·
plain them, and I would specially refer my readers to my .Astrological
Magazine, Sarwarthachintamani and Lectures. I have explained at
length the intimate connection between Karma results and, how they
work and how they can be overcome. Performance of any one of these
remedies for the evilR arising from any other cause will not be of any use,
